source: VidIQ outliers — top VTuber Shorts by breakout score (last 3 months), 6 keyword pulls: vtuber / vtuber art / vtuber model / vtuber clips / how to be a vtuber / vtuber debut
note: Real titles from proven breakout VTuber Shorts. The analyzer uses `templates` as reference shapes for suggestTitles, `high_performers` as inspiration when the user asks for examples, and `niche_top_titles` as per-niche top-20 lists. Refresh weekly via scheduled task.

this_vtuber.description: The 'This VTuber X' open-loop pattern — establishes that something specific + surprising is about to happen. Strongest single shape in the VTuber Shorts niche.
patterns: This VTuber will {action} for the content!?
real_examples: This VTuber Customization Option Is Insane
This vtuber SUCKS man
This VTuber Just Became Lost Media. We Have Lost History
This VTuber wants to Know You!
This VTuber prefers being what!?
This VTuber went BALD!
This VTuber got lost in Minecraft...
This Voice Actress is Becoming a VTuber!
This VTuber has a Problem?!
This VTuber was KIDNAPPED 😱
This VTuber Is Actually a Tree
This VTuber Got ARRESTED For Her Own Art
This VTuber will bark for the content!?
This artist did what to their client??
Why this VTuber can't be a mother

vtuber_statement.description: Declarative '{VTuber} {action}' shape — like reporting an event the viewer NEEDS to see. The highest-volume category across every niche pull.
real_examples: Vtuber Design Controversy!!
Vtuber Accidentally Mogged on the Enemy Ezreal in League
A Vtuber Voice Actor?!
VTuber Finds New Science In Subnautica 2?!
VTuber drama gets completely out of hand
VTuber has a CREEPY experience
VTuber Language Exchange Goes WRONG
VTuber Guesses What Fruit This Is
WD-40 could KILL a VTuber
vtuber almost uninstalls
Vtuber Is A Martial Artist?!
Vtuber Is A Wealthy Crystal Miner?!
Vtuber encounters a wild Warwick
Sinder Might ACTUALLY Be The Smartest Vtuber
Chat Bullies VTuber and Faces the Consequences
Vtuber creates their true selves
VTuber realized what this could mean?
VTuber figures out how tall she really is?
Vtubers finds most Rage Bait Game..
vtuber can't be stopped... lamar gta5

how_to.description: Tutorial / how-to shape — strong for educational + setup content. Direct, scannable, highly searchable.
patterns: How to Set Up {feature} for Vtuber Models
How Are VTuber Models ACTUALLY Made?
HOW TO BE A {niche} VTUBER TUTORIAL
real_examples: How to Make a Vtuber Speak Sign Language
HOW TO BE A SIMRACING VTUBER TUTORIAL
How I Use The Former Bird App
Vtubers EXPLAINED for dummies!
How to Set Up Hand Toggles for Vtuber Models
How Are VTuber Models ACTUALLY Made?

pov.description: POV framing — relatability winner on Shorts/TikTok. Viewer self-identifies before they click. Doubled coverage this week; the rigging-job POV is the #2 breakout overall.
patterns: POV you're about to {action} but it goes wrong
real_examples: Pov: making with vtuber move is your job!
POV chat redeems my female vtuber model toggle ♀️

curiosity_gap.description: Open-loop curiosity — viewer can't resist clicking to find out. Questions, secrets, price tags, and superlative teases dominate.
patterns: The most cursed thing to happen while {scenario}...
What no one tells you about {topic}
real_examples: Nobody Can Guess Where This VTuber Is From…
What even is Vtuber physics?
Do Vtubers track with their mouse?
The shocking reality of VTuber avatars
The most cursed thing to happen while this VTuber was drawing...
Midwestern VTuber has a secret obsession
My model has a "tiny" secret... 🦀
Her Vtuber Model Cost $2500
Lots of Vtubers do this
I got dumped for NOT being a VTUBER?
Men Gate keeping Laugher NOW?
The life of a Vtuber Model Artist

comparison.description: 'X vs Y' framing — invites debate, drives comments. Tripled coverage this week thanks to the clips niche pull.
real_examples: Cheap vs Expensive VTuber Designs!
Male vs Female VTuber Energy
The VTuber vs. IRL Trend

shock_reaction.description: Strong emotional reaction or punchy single-phrase hook — one/two-word meme captions. Massive breakout potential when the clip carries it (FACE VERIFICATION still leads; K-WORD and I'm SCARED back this week).
real_examples: FACE VERIFICATION
Touch Grass
Unfortunate
100% | @KumiVT
Meeting Boris
K-WORD
I'm SCARED
Good Luck
VTUBER TOS
My Head is Stuck!
The only one way to go
That's Exactly How It Works
Can't Show Proof If There Are No Clips
Art takes TIME!
I threw cheese at a Vtuber

setup_tutorial.description: Budget / setup content — proven CTR with concrete numbers and gear advice.
patterns: Build a Full VTuber Setup for UNDER ${amount}!
You CAN Have TOO MUCH {thing} on a VTuber Model
real_examples: Build a Full VTuber Setup for UNDER $80!
You CAN Have TOO MUCH Motion on a VTuber Model
Making the Perfect VTuber Intro

self_deprecating.description: Humble / honest framing — viewers love a creator being real about the grind or their own flaws.
patterns: My VTuber {asset} is {flaw}… But It Somehow Works
Vtuber {activity} is not for the weak
real_examples: My VTuber Design is Lazy… But It Somehow Works 💀
Vtuber model making is not for the weak 🫩

face_or_reveal.description: Reveal-style — face reveal, model reveal, behind-the-scenes, identity drops. Quadrupled coverage this week via the debut niche pull.
real_examples: I'm Bald ! VTuber Model Reveal
Face Revealing to My Artist!
Hololive Reveals Their New Trainees!
Yes, I am a VTuber

origin_story.description: The 'how/why I became a VTuber' origin hook. Personal, identity-driven. 'WHY I BECAME A VTUBER' resurfaced via the debut pull.
patterns: How I Accidentally Became a VTuber
real_examples: WHY I BECAME A VTUBER
How I Accidentally Became a VTuber
This Voice Actress is Becoming a VTuber!

make_my_own.description: First-person creation/transformation reveal: 'I Made/Designed/Rigged/Turned' a VTuber. Process + payoff in one hook, often with a constraint, timeframe, or challenge framing.
patterns: I designed this vtuber model with only {number} shapes!
I Rigged My Own {style} Vtuber Model in {timeframe}!
I turned this Vtuber into a {thing}! {challenge_name}
real_examples: I Made My Own VTuber!
I designed this vtuber model with only 4 shapes!
I turned this Vtuber into a Gremlin! Art Challenge
I Rigged My Own Chibi Vtuber Model in 7 Days!
PolarCub commissioned me!

series_progress.description: NEW this week — episodic day-count / episode-count build series ('Day N of Making...'). Serializes one project into many Shorts; viewers subscribe to follow the journey. 6 breakout examples across the model + how-to pulls.
patterns: Day {n} of Making a 2D VTuber model
Day {n} of Making a VTuber Model - {milestone}
Trying to become a vtuber Day {n}
real_examples: Day 1 of Making a 2D VTuber model
Day 3 of Making a 2D VTuber model- VOTING TIME
Day 4 of Making a 2D VTuber Model- Face Overhaul
Day 5 of Making a VTuber Model-The Chat's Rat
Rigging my Vtuber Model Episode 2
Trying to become a vtuber Day 34
